title: Bennett The Sages ReReview of Evangelion

wikitext:
[]: Bennett The Sage's (Re)Review of Evangelion             Quote Post by GAP » Wed Sep 13, 2023 11:30 pm Here is the link to the video in question: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ifRBljYeDnU I know that Bennett the Sage is not very well liked around here but he made another review of Evangelion that is much better than his old one.

[]: Re: Bennett The Sage's (Re)Review of Evangelion             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Sep 14, 2023 3:33 am I can't do it. His older reviews are some of the worst shit I've ever seen.

[]: Re: Bennett The Sage's (Re)Review of Evangelion             Quote Post by GAP » Thu Sep 14, 2023 4:42 pm He has improved a lot since those days. I may not agree with everything but he did improve.
